subHeadline: Not a navigation grid — a verdict on every generation, drawn from real enquiry volume and replacement economics.
keyTakeaway: Every Jaguar generation has a clear winner and loser from a reliability and replacement cost perspective. The F-Pace X761 stands alone as the only model with a clean Safe verdict across every engine variant in our data.

exampleVerdict.bestGeneration: The only F-Pace generation (X761), for its strong retained values and the widest safe engine coverage in the range.
exampleVerdict.worstEngine: Early AJ200D units without documented chain-tensioner inspection — same caveat as Land Rover's Ingenium diesel.
exampleVerdict.mostReliableEngine: The AJ200P/204PT Ingenium petrol — no meaningful weak point beyond routine water pump replacement.
exampleVerdict.highestRisk: None flagged at the model level — F-Pace is the one Jaguar with a clean ✅ Safe verdict across every engine variant in our data.
exampleVerdict.bestUsedBuy: A 2019+ F-Pace with full service history — the strongest all-round ownership profile of any Jaguar currently on sale.
